summary: ENR field validation partially implemented. Fork digest validated but cgc (custody_group_count) lacks upper bound validation at trust boundary. Defense-in-depth exists downstream.
ENR publishing logic is well-structured with cgc non-negativity validation. Minor gap in upper bound validation but mitigated by downstream checks.
ENR evaluation logic correctly validates fork digest. nfd field not validated but is informational only per spec. No vulnerability.
Blob sidecar serving during fork transition correctly uses milestone-based branching. Routes to reconstruction path for Fulu and later.
FuluStateUpgrade.upgrade() correctly updates Fork object with proper previousVersion, currentVersion, and epoch values.
process_proposer_lookahead correctly maintains the EIP-7917 invariant. Vector size preserved, shift operation correct, target epoch calculation matches spec.
